purpose: Answer user questions with direct generation or retrieval-augmented, multi-modal, evidence-grounded responses.

actors.name: Domain Expert / End User
actors.description: Asks text, image, document, audio, video, database, or knowledge-graph questions and verifies citations.

actors.name: Admin / Data Curator
actors.description: Manages data ingestion, quality, permissions, metadata, evaluation sets, and feedback remediation.

external_systems.name: Enterprise Data Sources
external_systems.description: PDF, scanned documents, images, tables, audio, video, SQL databases, logs, and knowledge graphs.

external_systems.name: External / Local Model Provider
external_systems.description: LLM, VLM, embedding, reranker, ASR, OCR, and verifier model endpoints.

external_systems.name: Monitoring / Evaluation Platform
external_systems.description: Phoenix traces, Ragas metrics, audit logs, and dashboards.

containers.name: Web UI / SDK / API Client
containers.responsibility: Collect questions, uploads, sessions, citation inspection, and user feedback.

containers.name: API Gateway
containers.responsibility: Authentication, rate limiting, session routing, file upload, and streaming response.

containers.name: RAG Orchestrator
containers.responsibility: Plan, decide whether retrieval is needed, route modalities, control retry loops, and enforce budgets.

containers.name: Retrieval Service
containers.responsibility: Run text, page/image, document, audio/video, SQL, KG, and web retrieval with permission filters.

containers.name: Tool Registry
containers.responsibility: Register and invoke OCR, ASR, VLM caption, layout parser, table parser, chart parser, SQL, KG, and web search tools.

containers.name: Evidence Fusion & Verification Service
containers.responsibility: Merge candidates, rerank, deduplicate, pack evidence, map citations, detect conflicts, and verify support.

containers.name: Generation & Response Service
containers.responsibility: Generate grounded answers, verify answer sentences, render citations, and return uncertainty or clarification.

containers.name: Ingestion & Indexing Workers
containers.responsibility: Connect, parse, normalize, chunk, enrich metadata, embed, and build modality-specific indexes.

data_stores.name: Raw Object Store
data_stores.description: Raw files, page images, image regions, audio/video segments, and parsed artifacts.

data_stores.name: Metadata DB
data_stores.description: Source, version, ACL, timestamps, schema descriptions, entity links, and citation anchors.

data_stores.name: BM25 / Keyword Index
data_stores.description: Text, OCR, ASR, table facts, and keyword retrieval.

data_stores.name: Vector DB
data_stores.description: Dense, sparse, image, page, region, audio/video segment, and multi-vector embeddings.

data_stores.name: SQL / Warehouse
data_stores.description: Structured business tables, reports, logs, metrics, and SQL execution results.

data_stores.name: Knowledge Graph
data_stores.description: Entities, relations, paths, subgraphs, rules, and linked evidence.

data_stores.name: Cache / Memory Store
data_stores.description: Session memory, tool-result cache, evidence cache, and embedding cache.
